violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed uncovered food in walk in cooler. Food must be covered to prevent contamination.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -Observed stove by pantry had no vent hood over it.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed dried food inside microwave.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Observed doors and sides of appliances need to be cleaned.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used during three compartment sink operation. -Observed staff washing dishes by hand with no sanitizer in use.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Observed food in screen of hand sink.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floor in pantry area and around stove, grill and fryer was not clean.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Observed damaged and missing ceiling panels in food prep area. -Observed exposed insulation in food prep area. -Observed floor in walk in cooler has cracked tiles.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — ---Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device.--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. -Observed broken soap dispenser and no hand soap at hand sink.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed bin of uncovered tortilla chips.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Observed aluminum foil under burners on range. Foil is not a cleanable material and needs to be changed daily.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — ---Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Observed food in hand sink.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. -Observed missing ceiling panels with exposed wood in food prep area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floors .walls, and ceiling need to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Observed exposed insulation in pantry area. -Observed cracks in tile in food prep area and in walk in cooler.
